Curriculum ← Unit 1

📚 Unit 1: Resources & References

The Evolution of PMM — supporting research and frameworks

📊 McKinsey Research

📄
Unlocking the Next Frontier of Personalized Marketing
McKinsey's January 2025 study on how AI is transforming personalization at scale — and why the old "spray and pray" model is losing effectiveness.
McKinsey · January 2025
 📄
State of Marketing Europe 2026
Key finding: 72% of marketing leaders increasing budgets in 2026, but only the top 6% ("AI high performers") achieving 22% efficiency gains.
McKinsey · November 2025

📈 Gartner Research

📊
IT Spending Forecast 2026
$6.15 trillion in global IT spending forecast (up 10.8% YoY), with enterprise software growing 15.2% — the fastest segment.
Gartner · 2026 Forecast
 📉
Hype Cycle for AI in Marketing
Useful context for understanding where different AI marketing capabilities are in maturity — and what's real vs. hype.
Gartner · Annual Update

🎯 Pragmatic Institute

🗂️
The Pragmatic Framework
The 37-activity PMM framework referenced throughout this curriculum. The industry standard for organizing product marketing work.
Pragmatic Institute · Framework

📖 Deep Dives from Future of PMM

🧠
Where Do You Sit? Understanding Your AI Working Posture
A deep dive into Helen Edwards' Cognitive Sovereignty framework — context for one of the baseline assessments.
10 min read
 🎯
The Full-Stack Buyer
How AI is creating a new type of enterprise buyer who researches, evaluates, and decides with unprecedented speed and depth.
12 min read

🎓 Baseline Assessments

📊
10x PMM Scorecard
Self-assessment of your current AI adoption across PMM activities. Establish your baseline before starting the curriculum.
~5 minutes
 🧠
Where Do You Sit? Assessment
Based on Helen Edwards' Cognitive Sovereignty framework. How comfortable are you delegating different types of decisions to AI?
~5 minutes

🔗 SAP Internal Resources

🏢
SAP PMM Competency Model
Internal framework for PMM skill development and career progression.
SAP Internal
🤖
SAP AI Guidelines for Marketing
Corporate guidelines for responsible AI use in marketing activities.
SAP Internal
